description_long: This storage box features a robust, rectangular design with a predominantly orange and gray color scheme, accented by black corner reinforcements. The front and back panels display geometric patterns and Japanese text, suggesting a utilitarian or industrial purpose. The top section is slightly raised and appears to have a recessed handle for easy carrying, while the sides are reinforced for durability. The box is constructed from hard plastic or composite material, with visible screws and seams indicating a secure, possibly watertight assembly. The front panel includes a set of translucent, hexagonal windows, possibly for viewing contents or status indicators. The overall appearance is modern and functional, suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or maintenance areas.
description: A sturdy, orange and gray storage box with reinforced corners, a recessed handle, and translucent hexagonal windows on the front. Its industrial design and visible labeling make it ideal for urban or utility settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the orange panel with three translucent hexagonal windows, a central recessed handle, and Japanese text at the top and bottom.
description_view_1: Rear view features a solid orange panel with a central black section, a green indicator bar, and Japanese text at the bottom.
description_view_2: Opposite front view, similar to view 0 but with slight differences in the arrangement of the hexagonal windows and text placement.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view, mirroring view 1 with the same green indicator bar and Japanese text, but with text placement swapped compared to view 1.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed label area with Japanese text
